abstract: Comprehensive guide for Tigris snapshots and forking, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Explains snapshots as git-like tags for entire buckets and forking as instant copy-on-write bucket duplication. Covers createSnapshot for point-in-time captures, listSnapshots for enumerating snapshots, createFork for isolated environment creation, and restoreFromSnapshot for recovery. Details use cases including point-in-time recovery, version control for data, reproducibility for testing, developer sandboxes with production data, and AI agent environment provisioning. Emphasizes the copy-on-write architecture that enables instant operations even for terabyte-scale data and the deletion protection that forks provide from source buckets.
